case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBLILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. TOWER VALET PARKING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING, INC.
DECLARATION OF BONNIE DAUGHERTY RE: CCP 585(D) (THE INSURED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBLILE INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBLILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUN-10-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBLILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING, INC. $1,279.71 PRINCIPAL, $190.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,470.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBLILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING, INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY VANNI, JOHN P

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $190.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER VALET PARKING, INC.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
